agents.name: Aria
agents.rationale: Full exit required this window; setting limit at 990 matches the prior clear price, signaling competitive willingness to transact below NAV while maximizing fill probability against unseen subscriber liquidity. The 10 bps discount from NAV is well within the 300 bps risk tolerance and reflects the interaction of urgency, inventory pressure, and prior market context.

factors.nav_signal: Attested NAV is 1000, so 990 represents a modest 1% discount that still provides fair value reference while ensuring the order is priced attractively to clear.
factors.inventory_risk: Fund inventory is exactly 100 units with zero cash, making full exit at max_size=100 mandatory to eliminate position risk this window.
factors.fill_probability: Pricing at the prior clear price of 990 aligns with observed market equilibrium, maximizing the probability that incoming subscribers will match against this redemption order.
factors.prior_context: Window 6 cleared previously at 990, establishing a price anchor; matching that level avoids undercutting unnecessarily while remaining competitive versus any other redeem orders priced higher.

agents.name: Boreas
agents.rationale: With zero fund inventory, ample cash, and a 350bps risk appetite above NAV, I bid aggressively at 1035 to dominate the crossing window against unseen redeemers; the prior clear at 990 signals recent softness but the attested NAV at 1000 and my accumulator mandate justify pricing well above it to ensure a fill. I size at 85 (below the 100 max) to leave a buffer against overexposure while still commanding a dominant presence in the cross.

factors.nav_signal: Attested NAV is 1000, and my 350bps risk appetite allows a limit up to 1035, which I use fully to signal strong buy conviction above fair value.
factors.inventory_risk: Fund inventory is zero and cash is 200000, so taking on up to 85 units at 1035 costs ~87,975, well within my cash buffer and leaves room for future windows.
factors.fill_probability: Bidding at 1035—35 ticks above NAV—substantially increases the probability of clearing against any redeemer priced anywhere near or below NAV in this sealed uniform-price window.
factors.prior_context: The prior clear at 990 (10 below NAV) suggests recent redemption pressure; an aggressive above-NAV bid this window should flip the imbalance and secure a favorable cross for the subscribe side.
